title: Section 23
content: The Financial Corporation may appoint such officers, advisers and employees as it considers necessary for the efficient performance of its functions, and determine, by regulations, their conditions of appointment and service and the remuneration payable to them. 1* * * * *
footnote: 1. The proviso omitted by Act 39 of 2000, s. 16 (w.e.f. 5-9-2000).
